prompt: Write an iOS SwiftUI view showing a red Text("Hello"). Output only the Swift code.
Write an iOS SwiftUI observable view model class named Counter with an Int count and a view that displays it. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI view with a blue rounded rectangle (corner radius 12) using the current idiom. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI TabView with two tabs (Home, Settings) using the current iOS 18+ idiom. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI Toggle tinted purple using the current idiom. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI master-detail layout with a sidebar list and a detail pane that adapts on iPad. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI navigation flow that pushes a detail view from a list using the current value-based idiom. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI settings screen using a Form with sections of toggles and pickers. Output only Swift.
Bridge a UIKit UITextView into an iOS SwiftUI view. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI view that presents a sheet with medium and large detents. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI view that loads data asynchronously when it appears, using the current idiom. Output only Swift.
Write an iOS SwiftUI view with a @State String and an onChange handler using the current two-parameter idiom. Output only Swift.
